name: German Chocolate Cake from Scratch
recipeInstructions:
Melt chocolate in a heatproof bowl over boiling water, stirring until smooth. Let cool.
Cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla and the cooled chocolate mixture until blended.
Alternately add flour, baking soda, and salt with buttermilk, mixing only to combine.
Fold in beaten egg whites.
Pour batter into 3–8 or 9-inch cake pans that have been greased and floured. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes, or until a tester inserted lightly into the center springs back up slightly when pressed with a fingertip.
